title: OpenMentor · Backend API
description: Go API deep dive: HTTP traffic by route, business funnels, Go runtime and error logs.

panels.title: Request Rate by Route
panels.description: API HTTP requests per second, top 10 routes.

panels.title: Error Rate
panels.description: Percentage of API requests returning 5xx, plus per-route 5xx rate.

panels.title: Latency Percentiles
panels.description: p50 / p95 / p99 HTTP request duration for the API.

panels.title: p95 Latency by Route
panels.description: 95th percentile request duration for the 10 slowest routes.

panels.title: Mentor Registrations (1h)
panels.description: Mentor registrations by status over trailing 1h windows.

panels.title: Contact Form Submissions (1h)
panels.description: Contact form submissions by status over trailing 1h windows.

panels.title: Auth Requests (1h)
panels.description: Mentor auth login and verify requests over trailing 1h windows.

panels.title: Auth Latency p95
panels.description: 95th percentile duration of login and verify operations.

panels.title: Request Status Transitions (1h)
panels.description: Mentorship request status transitions (from → to) over trailing 1h windows.

panels.title: Request Declines by Reason (1h)
panels.description: Declined mentorship requests by decline reason over trailing 1h windows.

panels.title: Reviews (1h)
panels.description: Review submissions and automated review checks over trailing 1h windows.

panels.title: Photo Classifications & Profile Updates (1h)
panels.description: Photo classification results, profile updates and picture uploads over trailing 1h windows.

panels.title: Cutouts by Outcome (1h)
panels.description: Hero-cutout pipeline results (upload) by outcome over trailing 1h windows.

panels.title: Background-Removal Latency p95
panels.description: p95 of the rembg background-removal call (upload).

panels.title: Gate Rejections by Reason (1h)
panels.description: Cutouts rejected by the mask quality gate (upload), by reason.

panels.title: Goroutines
panels.description: Number of goroutines in the API process; a steady climb suggests a goroutine leak.

panels.title: Heap Allocated
panels.description: Go heap bytes currently allocated by the API process.

panels.title: Active HTTP Requests
panels.description: Number of in-flight HTTP requests being handled by the API.

panels.title: API Error Logs
panels.description: Most recent error-level log lines from the Go API.
